bugs.class: off-by-one (d <= days iterates days+1 buckets; one extra day)
N+1 (one Order.find query per day inside the loop; should be a single aggregation)
injection (caller-provided expr passed to $where = NoSQL/JS injection)
race (read-modify-write of the view counter; concurrent bumps lose increments; should be $inc)
null-deref (Widget.findById can return null; w.views then throws)
